prompt: 🌿 1. Starbucks Concept: “The Coffee Planet” Visual: A floating green sphere made entirely of swirling coffee, latte foam, and tiny coffee beans forming continents. Miniature person: A tiny barista stands on the curve, pouring milk that becomes clouds. Background: Deep Starbucks green gradient. Logo: Centered at the top, glowing softly. Slogan (bottom): “Inspiring and nurturing the human spirit.” Feel: Calm, global, eco-conscious. 🍏 2. Apple Concept: “The Living Circuit Tree” Visual: A sleek apple-shaped tree made of glowing green circuits and glass, roots subtly forming charging cables. Miniature person: A tiny human climbs the tree, plugging in a device like harvesting energy. Background: Minimal matte green with soft light bloom. Logo: Polished chrome Apple logo at top. Slogan (bottom): “Think Different.” Feel: Clean, futuristic, sustainable tech. 🌱 3. Nike Concept: “The Swoosh Landscape” Visual: A giant Nike swoosh transformed into a grassy hill with embedded running tracks. Miniature person: A runner sprinting along the swoosh curve like it’s a terrain. Background: Vibrant green field fading into sky. Logo: Classic swoosh above (subtle duplication works stylistically). Slogan (bottom): “Just Do It.” Feel: Energy + nature + motion. 🍃 4. Heineken Concept: “The Bottle Forest” Visual: A giant Heineken bottle turned into a glowing green forest, with trees shaped from glass and hops. Miniature person: A camper sitting near the base, lit by the green glow. Background: Dark green cinematic tone. Logo: Bright and crisp at top. Slogan (bottom): “Open Your World.” Feel: Premium, immersive, slightly magical. 🌍 5. IKEA Concept: “Flatpack Nature” Visual: A surreal tree assembled from IKEA flat-pack wooden panels, visible screws, and instruction lines. Miniature person: A tiny person assembling one branch using an Allen key. Background: Soft green with Scandinavian simplicity. Logo: IKEA logo top center. Slogan (bottom): “The Wonderful Everyday.” Feel: Clever, playful, eco-modern. 🍀 6. Spotify Concept: “Soundwave Garden” Visual: Giant green soundwaves growing like plants, forming a surreal audio landscape. Miniature person: A tiny listener sitting on a wave with headphones. Background: Spotify green gradient with subtle glow. Logo: Floating at the top. Slogan (bottom): “Listening is everything.” Feel: Relaxed, immersive, organic sound.
